content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with strong sector breadth: pharma, FMCG, capital goods, defense, autos, chemicals, and IT all participating. Global cues constructive (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%) and US-Iran de-escalation supportive. However, portfolio is heavily deployed across 11 names with several already in profit — priority is risk management (trail SLs on winners) over new adds. Cumulative P&L deeply negative (-53.72%) commands capital preservation discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Stored SL 1035 already at +5.2% from entry (locked profit). Trail-gap discipline: SL at 1035 vs CMP 1056.70 = 2.05% below CMP, comfortably above 1% floor. Holding SL/target as-is — no-op MODIFY would be wasted; emitting HOLD instead. Correction: keeping HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1035 already +5.2% above entry (profit locked). CMP 1056.70 sits 2.05% above SL — within trail-gap discipline. Thesis intact: HFC NIM expansion + RBI easing cycle, Q4 PAT +19% YoY, ICICI Sec target 1350. Hold for target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.78%. SL 121 = -3.3% from entry. Spot gold +3% on May 6, INR weakness, rate-cut path supportive. Hedge/diversifier role intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1735 vs CMP 1757.10 = SL only 1.26% below CMP — already tight. SL is +2.06% above entry 1700 (profit locked). No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.36% unrealized. Stored SL 1735 already locks +2% profit, sits 1.26% below CMP (within trail-gap floor). Fresh ATH today on Europe expansion + FY27 guidance. Nomura target 1930. Hold to target 1820."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.21%. Stored SL 4570 (-0.11% from entry). Tightening SL up to breakeven 4575 — trail-gap from CMP = 1.20% (just above 1% floor). BUT board meeting May 14 (5 sessions) is a binary catalyst — per Rule 11, default disposition is risk-trim; tightening SL to entry is option (b)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL already 6960 (entry 6900, +0.87% above entry). CMP 7049 vs SL 6960 = 1.26% below CMP — within trail-gap. No-op MODIFY since values unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.16% unrealized. SL 6960 already above entry (+0.87%), locking profit. Chemours Opteon AI-cooling pact announced today — fresh catalyst. Hold to target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.86%. Stored SL 820 (-2.15%). Tightening SL slightly to 825 to reduce risk (still 2.39% below CMP — within trail-gap floor). Q4 results pending May 2026 — binary risk; can't tighten more aggressively without forcing exit on chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.08% (essentially flat). SL 365 = -1.08% from entry. Q4 PAT +30% beat, AUM +27%, fresh ATH today. Tight stop already in place — holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.31%. SL 815 = -0.61% from entry. ATH today on Q4 beat (+22% revenue). Tight stop in place; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Stored SL 1260 already at breakeven. Trail-gap CMP-SL = 1.49% — within floor. No-op since values unchanged — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6% unrealized. SL 1260 at breakeven, 1.49% below CMP. Q4 PAT +130%, Encora deal closed. Hold to target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.30%. SL 3000 = -0.83% from entry, 1.12% below CMP — within trail-gap. Defense rally intact (+9.2% today). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16%. SL 798 = -0.99% from entry, 1.15% below CMP — within trail-gap. Q4 record revenue. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Compelling setup (Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 12,000 buyback floor 16% above CMP), but portfolio already heavily deployed (11 holdings). Adding another auto/financial cluster name without first letting current book breathe risks over-concentration. Pass for now; revisit if a position closes."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (revenue +27%, PAT +31%) and target upgrades to 10,500, but I already hold TITAGARH and HAL in Capital Goods cluster. Cluster discipline (Rule 10): adding a third Capital Goods name on a session where I already hold two would exceed prudent cluster cap. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "reasoning": "Quality Q4 print but valuation full at +5.68% post-results pop, and book is already near 80% deployed soft target. No room without trimming an existing name; existing book is performing — let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Board meeting TODAY for Q4 results + analyst call 3:30 PM IST = binary event within hours. Rule 11 prohibits new full-size CNC entry into 3-session binary. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "reasoning": "HFCL MIS BUY LIMIT 133.50 placed 1945min (~32 hours) ago — stale across multiple sessions. MIS orders cannot persist; cancel to clean up the order book."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +5.2% profit; trail-gap 2.05% below CMP — adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Slightly underwater (-0.78%); SL at 121 (-3.3%) gives gold room to work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry (+2%), 1.26% below CMP — already trailed appropriately."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL up to breakeven (entry 4575) ahead of May 14 board meeting/Q4 binary — Rule 11 risk-trim option (b)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already +0.87% above entry, 1.26% below CMP — fresh Chemours catalyst supports holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Modest tighten from 820 to 825 (still 2.4% below CMP — well above 1% trail-gap floor and 0.5% min-move threshold). Q4 results pending — limited room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat unrealized; SL tight at 1% below entry. Wait for momentum to convert."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.31% unrealized; SL already tight. Hold for FMCG run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; CMP +1.6%. Adequate trail-gap. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1.12% below CMP — within trail-gap floor; defense momentum strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1.15% below CMP — within trail-gap floor; Q4 record revenue. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO (buyback floor at 12,000), POLYCAB (target 10,500), and M&M (Q4 +42%) all qualify on conviction but no capital free without trimming. Will reconsider if any current position hits target or stops out. BHARATFORG: re-evaluate post-Q4 results tomorrow once binary passes — if guidance positive and stock holds 1850+, valid entry. NEULANDLAB and SRF noted but not adding into already-overweight chemicals via NAVINFLUOR.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio is ~80% deployed across 11 names — disciplined diversification but limits new-entry slots. Today's broad rally is favorable for the book; key risk is HAL's May 14 binary event (mitigated by SL move to breakeven). Cluster check: Capital Goods = HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE (~3 names, ~17% capital — within cluster cap but at limit, no more adds). Financial Services = PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS (~3 names, ~15% — also at limit). Cleaning up stale HFCL MIS order. Net stance: defensive position-management mode, no new entries this tick."
}
